mapper.insert: insert into space (host_id, title, description, address, price_per_hour, capacity) values (#{hostId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{address}, #{pricePerHour}, #{capacity})
mapper.select: select s.id as s_id , s.host_id , s.title , s.description , s.address , s.price_per_hour , s.capacity , s.created_at as s_created_at , s.updated_at as s_updated_at , s.is_deleted as s_is_deleted , si.id as si_id , si.space_id , si.image_url , si.is_main , si.created_at as si_created_at , si.updated_at as si_updated_at , si.is_deleted as si_is_deleted from space s left join space_image si on s.id = si.space_id and si.is_deleted = 0 where s.id = #{id} and s.is_deleted = 0

select id as id , host_id as hostId , title as title , description as description , address as address , price_per_hour as pricePerHour , capacity as capacity , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , is_deleted as isDeleted from space where host_id = #{hostId} and is_deleted = 0 order by id desc

select count(*) from space where is_deleted = 0
and (s.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or s.address like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
